pages.home.title: Christophe R Patraldo — Author
pages.home.hero.label: A Creative Writing Space
pages.home.hero.tagline: A community of writers finding their voice — one daily prompt at a time. Hosted by Christophe R Patraldo.
pages.home.works.label: What We Offer
pages.home.works.heading: A Space for Writers
pages.home.works.description: Tools and community to nurture your creative practice.
pages.home.works.filmscripts.desc: Feature-length and short screenplays spanning drama, sci-fi, and thriller.
pages.home.works.novels.desc: Long-form fiction exploring near futures, alien encounters, and the stories we tell ourselves.
pages.home.works.shortStories.desc: Bite-sized narratives that pack a punch — flash fiction to novelettes.
pages.home.works.comingSoon.desc: New projects in development. Stay tuned for announcements.
pages.home.about.label: About
pages.home.about.heading: About This Space
pages.home.about.paragraph1: This is a place for anyone who wants to write. Whether you're a seasoned author or picking up a pen for the first time, you'll find a daily creative seed, a quiet space to work, and a community to share your words with.
pages.home.about.paragraph2: Accept the daily prompt or pass for a new one. Write freely or let the community prompt spark something unexpected. Your stats track your journey — streaks, words, growth.

pages.about.title: About — Ex Libris
pages.about.heading: About Ex Libris
pages.about.paragraph1: Welcome to my personal book review corner. I write honest, thoughtful reviews of books I'm reading — and you can too, once you sign up!
pages.about.paragraph2: Coming soon: collaborative writing exercises, reading challenges, and more.

pages.privacy.title: Privacy Policy — Ex Libris
pages.privacy.heading: Privacy Policy
pages.privacy.sections.responsable.title: 1. Identity and Address of the Data Controller
pages.privacy.sections.dataCollection.in: Ex Libris collects the following personal data:
pages.privacy.sections.purposes.title: 3. Purposes of Processing
pages.privacy.sections.purposes.intro: Your personal data will be used for:
pages.privacy.sections.purposes.items.ac: Creating and managing your user account
pages.privacy.sections.purposes.items.re: Publishing your book reviews and comments
pages.privacy.sections.transfers.title: 4. Data Transfers
pages.privacy.sections.transfers.intro: Your data may be transferred to and processed by:
pages.privacy.sections.transfers.cloudfl: Cloudflare, Inc. (United States) - Hosting and security
pages.privacy.sections.transfers.conclus: These transfers are necessary for service provision.
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.title: 5. ARCO Rights
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.intro: As a data subject, you have the right to:
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.access: Access: Know what data we have about you
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.cancel: Cancellation: Request deletion of your data
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.opposi: Opposition: Object to the processing of your data
pages.privacy.sections.arcoRights.contac: To exercise your ARCO rights, send an email to:
pages.privacy.sections.consent.title: 6. Consent Withdrawal
pages.privacy.sections.consent.text: You can withdraw your consent for data processing at any time by contacting us at:
pages.privacy.sections.cookies.title: 7. Cookies and Tracking Technologies
pages.privacy.sections.cookies.text: We use cookies to keep your session active and improve user experience. You can configure your browser to reject cookies, although this may affect site functionality.
pages.privacy.sections.security.title: 8. Security Measures
pages.privacy.sections.security.text: We implement administrative, technical, and physical security measures to protect your personal data, including password encryption and secure HTTPS connections.
pages.privacy.sections.changes.title: 9. Changes to Privacy Policy
pages.privacy.sections.changes.text: We reserve the right to modify this Privacy Policy. Changes will be published on this page and the update date will be modified.
pages.privacy.sections.contact.title: 10. Contact
pages.privacy.sections.contact.text: For any questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us at:
